title: A REVIEW ON MEDICAL CODING COURSE
author: Harini Uppada*, Sireesha Bammidi, Vinitha Konathala, Tanusree Muvvala.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Th    is review     article     on medical coding courses outlines     the medical coding procedure, the codes used by medical coders such as ICD (International Classification of Diseases), CPT (Current Procedure Terminology), HAPSC (Health Care Procedural Coding System).     It         details     the     benefits     for the future aspirants in medical coding field    ,     about the consequences of medical billing and coding errors and the challenges faced by the medical coders and billers     in their profession    . It also highlights the importance of certified courses and its training benefits in medical coding field along with the bright career opportunities for the future aspirants.   
   Keywords: Medical coding,     coders    ,     billers    ,     certified courses, career opportunities    .
